sections.heading: More manufacturing services
sections.text: More manufacturing services No more switching suppliers as your prototyping needs evolve. We have all the rapid prototyping technologies you need in one place. 3D printing CNC machining Sheet metal fabrication Hundreds of materials and surfaces finishes

sections.heading: Instant quotes, fast lead times
sections.text: Instant quotes, fast lead times No more waiting on RFQs. Our rapid prototyping quotes are instant and update in real time as you adjust production parameters. Create and finalize your own quotes online in minutes See bulk prices and lead times up front Instantly compare prices across technologies and materials Get an instant rapid prototyping quote

sections.heading: Automated DFM feedback
sections.text: Automated DFM feedback Stop designing perfect parts that arenât manufacturable. Our automated, real-time DFM feedback helps you make early adjustments before you even place an order. Integrate DFM into your workflow from day 1 3D printing: Intricate details, hard-to-remove support, thin walls CNC machining: Sharp corners, hard-to-remove volume, thin walls

sections.heading: Simple quote saving, editing and sharing
sections.text: Simple quote saving, editing and sharing Keeping track of quotes can be a nightmare. Our platform makes it simple, fast and convenient, removing a lot of the friction associated with managing traditional suppliers. Never search for quotes in your mailbox again Share, download and manage your quotes in one place

sections.heading: Online order management and delivery tracking
sections.text: Online order management and delivery tracking No more logging in on multiple order tracking and delivery platforms to check progress. Our platform helps save time on administrative tasks. Follow the production of your order online Receive automated email notifications at each stage of production and delivery

sections.heading: SLS rapid prototyping service
sections.text: SLS rapid prototyping service SLS printing service is great for functional prototypes of plastic parts requiring good mechanical properties. sections.heading: SLA rapid prototyping service
sections.text: SLA rapid prototyping service SLA is most suitable for visual applications where an injection mold-like, smooth surface finish, and a high level of feature detail are required. Standard capabilities Description Maximum build size 145 Ã 145 Ã 175 mm (5.7" x 5.7" x 6.8") Standard lead time 6 business days Dimensional accuracy Â± 0.5% with a lower limit of Â± 0.15 mm (Â± 0.006") Layer height 25-100 um Get an instant SLA rapid prototyping quote

sections.heading: FDM rapid prototyping service
sections.text: FDM rapid prototyping service FDM is suitable for prototyping for form-fit testing. It is the most affordable 3D printing technology and available in 12 different materials. Standard capabilities Description Maximum build size 500 x 500 x 500 mm (19.68’’ x 19.68’’ x 19.68’’)* Standard lead time 4 business days Dimensional accuracy Â± 0.5% with a lower limit on Â± 0.5 mm (0.0196’') Layer height 100-300 Î¼m Infill 20-100% The maximum build size for carbon-filled nylon (Onyx) is 320 mm x 132 mm x 154 mm Get an instant FDM rapid prototyping quote

sections.heading: More 3D printing rapid prototyping services
sections.text: More 3D printing rapid prototyping services We offer a total of six different 3d printing technologies for rapid prototyping, from low-cost and extremely fast technologies to technologies better suited for functional testing. Standard capabilities Description Fast, low-cost prototyping FDM, SLA and Polyjet Functional prototyping SLS and MJF Materials 25+ plastics Standard lead times 4-9 days Get an instant 3D printing rapid prototyping quote

sections.heading: CNC rapid prototyping
sections.text: CNC rapid prototyping CNC machining is the best rapid prototyping option for simple, metal parts, especially when dimensional accuracy is critical. Standard capabilities Description Processes Milling (3-, 4- & 5-axis) and turning Materials 35 metals and plastics (and counting) Finishes Smoothed, bead-blasted, anodized, powder-coated, electropolished, brushed and more Tolerances Down to +/-.0008â (0.020mm) Minimum order US$150 Lead times 5-15 days Get an instant CNC rapid prototyping quote
